<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is an ASP.NET Core Web API project. Use best practices for CORS, controller routing, and database access via System.Data.OleDb. The backend must be accessible from the /Frontend folder for browser-based requests.
